# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Storage Account with blob containers for static website hosting. Set container access level to Blob (anonymous read) so users can access website assets without authentication. This is for our public-facing website storage.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "storageAccountName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the storage account. Must be globally unique."
      },
      "defaultValue": "[format('stgpub{0}', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for all resources."
      }
    },
    "staticWebsiteIndexPage": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "index.html",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the index document for the static website."
      }
    },
    "staticWebsiteErrorPage": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "404.html",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The absolute path of the custom 404 error document for the static website."
      }
    },
    "publicContentContainerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "publicassets",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The name of the additional blob container for public content (e.g., images, CSS)."
      }
    },
    "storageSku": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_LRS",
      "allowedValues": [
        "Standard_LRS",
        "Standard_GRS",
        "Standard_RAGRS",
        "Premium_LRS"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "The SKU of the storage account."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[parameters('storageAccountName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "sku": {
        "name": "[parameters('storageSku')]"
      },
      "kind": "StorageV2",
      "properties": {
        "supportsHttpsTrafficOnly": true,
        "minimumTlsVersion": "TLS1_2",
        "allowBlobPublicAccess": true,
        "isHnsEnabled": false,
        "networkAcls": {
          "defaultAction": "Allow",
          "ipRules": [],
          "virtualNetworkRules": []
        },
        "staticWebsite": {
          "enabled": true,
          "indexDocument": "[parameters('staticWebsiteIndexPage')]",
          "errorDocument404Path": "[parameters('staticWebsiteErrorPage')]"
        }
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers",
      "apiVersion": "2023-01-01",
      "name": "[format('{0}/default/{1}', parameters('storageAccountName'), parameters('publicContentContainerName'))]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "publicAccess": "Blob"
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "staticWebsitePrimaryEndpoint": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.web]"
    },
    "publicContentContainerUrl": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[format('{0}{1}', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2023-01-01').primaryEndpoints.blob, parameters('publicContentContainerName'))]"
    }
  }
}
